title: Bloodlines and Old Hatred
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Unknown person #13, Rocks D. Xebec as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It will not be Mu who acts...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is this?! It doesn't hurt or even itch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thou shall be the one to externinate them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's absurd... what are ya talkin' about?!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: What lies in store for rocks' family?
